blocks.notes: Template src/templates/dialogs/threat-scaler.hbs was already fully Tailwind. The classes 'decreased', 'increased', 'negative', 'neutral' were legacy modifiers on .wh40k-stat-new / .wh40k-stat-change — the template already uses conditional inline tw-text-[#4caf50] / tw-text-[#f44336] instead. 'npc-threat-scaler-dialog' is a Foundry DEFAULT_OPTIONS.classes JS hook — must stay. Safe to delete CSS block once orchestrator confirms no other consumers.

templateChanges.replacement: tw-opacity-30 tw-cursor-not-allowed tw-relative (on .csd-roll-chip); added conditional <span> for ::after checkmark content
tw-text-center tw-text-xs tw-text-[rgba(232,220,196,0.5)] tw-mt-2 tw-m-0 tw-italic

Added Tailwind equivalents alongside: tw-w-[40px] tw-h-[36px] tw-flex tw-items-center tw-justify-center tw-bg-gradient-to-br tw-from-[rgba(76,175,80,0.3)] tw-to-[rgba(76,175,80,0.15)] tw-border-2 tw-border-[rgba(76,175,80,0.6)] tw-rounded-[6px] tw-text-[1.2rem] tw-font-bold tw-text-[color:var(--csd-bone,#e8dcc4)] tw-cursor-grab hover:tw-scale-110 hover:tw-border-[var(--csd-gold,#b08d57)]

jsHooks: csd-assigned-roll — querySelector('.csd-assigned-roll') in characteristic-setup-dialog.ts:217 and origin-path-builder.ts:1257

tw-py-[0.4rem] tw-px-[0.8rem] tw-bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,...)] tw-border tw-border-[var(--wh40k-color-gold-dark)] tw-rounded-[var(--wh40k-radius-md)] tw-text-[color:var(--wh40k-color-gold-light)] tw-text-[0.8rem] tw-font-semibold tw-cursor-pointer hover/active scale variants
